In this chunk, we test basic models of TBATS,ETS and Dynamic harmonic regression with ARIMA errors using Fourier terms for weekly + yearly seasonality
```{r include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(forecast)
library(readr)

# load processed data
source("Scripts/01_read_all_data.R")
```

```{r}
# 2) Split data exactly as requested
train_data <- data_all %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2005-01-01"),
         date <= as.Date("2010-06-30"))

valid_data <- data_all %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2010-07-01"),
         date <= as.Date("2010-07-31"))

full_train_data <- data_all %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2005-01-01"),
         date <= as.Date("2011-06-30"))
```

```{r include=FALSE}
# 3) Create time series objects
# Multiple seasonality: weekly + annual
ts_train_msts <- msts(
  train_data$daily_avg,
  seasonal.periods = c(7, 365.25)
)

ts_valid_msts <- msts(
  valid_data$daily_avg,
  seasonal.periods = c(7, 365.25)
)

ts_full_msts <- msts(
  full_train_data$daily_avg,
  seasonal.periods = c(7, 365.25)
)

# quick plot
autoplot(ts_train_msts) +
  ggtitle("Training Daily Electricity Load")
```

```{r}
# 4) Validation metric helper, only mape is required but rmse created for reference
rmse <- function(actual, predicted) {
  sqrt(mean((actual - predicted)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
}

mape <- function(actual, predicted) {
  mean(abs((actual - predicted) / actual), na.rm = TRUE) * 100
}
```

```{r}
# 5) Model 1: TBATS (tuned)
fit_tbats <- tbats(
  ts_train_msts,
  use.box.cox = NULL,
  use.trend = TRUE,
  use.damped.trend = TRUE,
  seasonal.periods = c(7, 365.25)
)

fc_tbats <- forecast(fit_tbats, h = 31)
```

```{r}
# 6) Model 2: ETS+STL
fit_stlf <- stlf(
  ts_train_msts,
  method = "ets",
  lambda = "auto",
  biasadj = TRUE,
  s.window = "periodic"
)

fc_stlf <- forecast(fit_stlf, h = 31)
```

```{r}
# 7) Model 3: ARIMA + Fourier
#    Tune Fourier terms using validation RMSE
best_dhr <- list(
  rmse = Inf,
  K_week = NA,
  K_year = NA,
  fit = NULL,
  fc = NULL
)
```

```{r}
# search grid; keep it moderate so runtime stays reasonable
for (K_week in 1:2) {
  for (K_year in 3:6) {
    xreg_train <- fourier(ts_train_msts, K = c(K_week, K_year))
    xreg_valid <- fourier(ts_train_msts, K = c(K_week, K_year), h = 31)

    fit_try <- auto.arima(
      ts_train_msts,
      xreg = xreg_train,
      seasonal = FALSE,          # seasonality handled by Fourier terms
      stepwise = TRUE,
      approximation = TRUE,
      lambda = "auto",
      biasadj = TRUE
    )

    fc_try <- forecast(fit_try, xreg = xreg_valid, h = 31)

    rmse_try <- rmse(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(fc_try$mean))

    if (rmse_try < best_dhr$rmse) {
      best_dhr$rmse <- rmse_try
      best_dhr$K_week <- K_week
      best_dhr$K_year <- K_year
      best_dhr$fit <- fit_try
      best_dhr$fc <- fc_try
    }
  }
}
```

```{r}
# 8) Compare validation performance
results <- tibble(
  model = c("TBATS", "ETS+STL", "ARIMA+Fourier"),
  RMSE = c(
    rmse(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(fc_tbats$mean)),
    rmse(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(fc_stlf$mean)),
    rmse(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(best_dhr$fc$mean))
  ),
  MAPE = c(
    mape(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(fc_tbats$mean)),
    mape(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(fc_stlf$mean)),
    mape(valid_data$daily_avg, as.numeric(best_dhr$fc$mean))
  )
) %>%
  arrange(RMSE)

print(results)

# plot best validation forecast
best_model_name <- results$model[1]
```

```{r}
if (best_model_name == "TBATS") {
  best_fc_valid <- fc_tbats
} else if (best_model_name == "ETS+S") {
  best_fc_valid <- fc_stlf
} else {
  best_fc_valid <- best_dhr$fc
}

autoplot(best_fc_valid) +
  autolayer(ts_valid_msts, series = "Actual") +
  ggtitle(paste("Best Validation Forecast:", best_model_name))

# 9) Retrain best model on full data through 2011-06-30
h_final <- 31

if (best_model_name == "TBATS") {

  final_fit <- tbats(
    ts_full_msts,
    use.box.cox = NULL,
    use.trend = TRUE,
    use.damped.trend = TRUE,
    seasonal.periods = c(7, 365.25)
  )

  final_fc <- forecast(final_fit, h = h_final)

} else if (best_model_name == "ETS") {

  ts_full_weekly <- ts(full_train_data$daily_avg, frequency = 7)
  final_fit <- ets(ts_full_weekly)
  final_fc <- forecast(final_fit, h = h_final)

} else {

  final_xreg_train <- fourier(
    ts_full_msts,
    K = c(best_dhr$K_week, best_dhr$K_year)
  )

  final_xreg_future <- fourier(
    ts_full_msts,
    K = c(best_dhr$K_week, best_dhr$K_year),
    h = h_final
  )

  final_fit <- auto.arima(
    ts_full_msts,
    xreg = final_xreg_train,
    seasonal = FALSE,
    stepwise = FALSE,
    approximation = FALSE,
    lambda = "auto",
    biasadj = TRUE
  )

  final_fc <- forecast(final_fit, xreg = final_xreg_future, h = h_final)
}

# 10) Build July 2011 forecast table
forecast_dates <- seq(as.Date("2011-07-01"), as.Date("2011-07-31"), by = "day")

forecast_output <- tibble(
  date = forecast_dates,
  forecast = as.numeric(final_fc$mean)
)

print(forecast_output)

# 11) Match Kaggle submission template
template_path <- "Output/submission_template.csv"
template <- read_csv(template_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

print(names(template))

# Try to match the template automatically
submission <- template


if (ncol(template) == 2) {
  submission[[1]] <- forecast_output$date
  submission[[2]] <- forecast_output$forecast
} else {
  # if more columns exist, update likely prediction column
  date_col <- names(template)[str_detect(names(template), regex("date|id", ignore_case = TRUE))]
  pred_col <- names(template)[str_detect(names(template), regex("forecast|demand|load|prediction", ignore_case = TRUE))]

  if (length(date_col) >= 1) submission[[date_col[1]]] <- forecast_output$date
  if (length(pred_col) >= 1) submission[[pred_col[1]]] <- forecast_output$forecast
}

# 12) Write submission file
write_csv(submission, "Output/group_submission_july2011.csv")

cat("\nSubmission file written to: Output/group_submission_july2011.csv\n")
cat("Best validation model:", best_model_name, "\n")

if (best_model_name == "DHR_ARIMA") {
  cat("Chosen Fourier terms: weekly K =", best_dhr$K_week,
      ", yearly K =", best_dhr$K_year, "\n")
}
```
